CustomField.description: Developer name of the EmailTemplate used by the implementing Apex class. The template must contain the placeholder {_Datatable_} at the location where the dynamically generated HTML table will be injected by Apex at runtime.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the developer name of the EmailTemplate (e.g. GridReviewEmailTemplate). The template must include {_Datatable_} where the Apex-generated HTML table should appear. This placeholder is replaced at runtime by the implementing class.
CustomField.label: Email Template
